steps.title: Identify the paradox signal
steps.content: The word although sets up a paradox: water is critical to life, but during early Earth when oceans dominated, water somehow affected protein formation in the opposite way. The blank must name that negative effect.

steps.title: Find the word for that effect
steps.content:
Hampered (hindered, obstructed) directly names a negative effect on formation. The other three choices describe unrelated or positive actions that don't express such an obstruction.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
